processing.text: if @@admin = 0 and @type = '1' begin if @@sysDatabaseName.dbo.MaxvOnline$System$GetAuthorize(@@admin, @@userID, 'Expense', 'Edit') = 0 select @type = '0' end declare @message nvarchar(4000), @q nvarchar(4000), @fields nvarchar(4000), @duplicate nvarchar(4000), @irregular nvarchar(4000), @field varchar(32), @irregularChars varchar(128), @r int select @irregularChars = &IrregularValue; select @duplicate = case @@language when 'v' then N'Giá trị tại ô %invalidCell đã có hoặc lồng nhau.' else 'The value of cell %invalidCell is invalid or already exists.' end select @irregular = case @@language when 'v' then N'Giá trị tại ô %invalidCell có chứa các ký tự: ' + @irregularChars else 'The value of cell %invalidCell contains any of the following characters: ' + @irregularChars end -- Check alter table @@table alter column ma_phi char(32) create index i on @@table (ma_phi) if @type = '0' delete @@table where ma_phi in (select ma_phi from dmphi) select @field = 'ma_phi', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_phi like '%[' + @irregularChars + ']%'&Irregular; select @field = 'nh_phi1', @r = min(stt) from @@table where nh_phi1 <> '' and nh_phi1 not in (select ma_nh from dmnhphi where loai_nh=1)&Error; select @field = 'nh_phi2', @r = min(stt) from @@table where nh_phi2 <> '' and nh_phi2 not in (select ma_nh from dmnhphi where loai_nh=2)&Error; select @field = 'nh_phi3', @r = min(stt) from @@table where nh_phi3 <> '' and nh_phi3 not in (select ma_nh from dmnhphi where loai_nh=3)&Error; select a.* into #k from @@table a join dmphi b on a.ma_phi = b.ma_phi delete @@table where ma_phi in (select ma_phi from #k) -- select @q = 'select top 1 @r = a.stt from @@table a, @@table b with (index(i)) where a.ma_phi <> b.ma_phi and a.ma_phi = rtrim(b.ma_phi)' exec sp_executesql @q, N'@r int output', @r = @r output&Duplicate; select top 1 @r = a.stt from @@table a, dmphi b with (index(PK_dmphi)) where a.ma_phi = rtrim(b.ma_phi)&Duplicate; select @q = 'select top 1 @r = b.stt from dmphi a, @@table b with (index(i)) where a.ma_phi = rtrim(b.ma_phi)' exec sp_executesql @q, N'@r int output', @r = @r output&Duplicate; -- Insert select @q = 'insert into dmphi(ma_phi, ten_phi, ten_phi2, nh_phi1, nh_phi2, nh_phi3, status, datetime0, datetime2, user_id0, user_id2, ' select @q = @q + 'ma_td1, ma_td2, ma_td3, sl_td1, sl_td2, sl_td3, gc_td1, gc_td2, gc_td3, s1, s2, s3, s4, s5, s6)' select @q = @q + 'select ma_phi, ten_phi, ten_phi2, nh_phi1, nh_phi2, nh_phi3, ''1'', getdate(), getdate(), rtrim(@@userID), rtrim(@@userID), '''', '''', '''', ' select @q = @q + ' 0, 0, 0, '''', '''', '''', '''', '''', '''', 0, 0, 0 from @@table' exec sp_executesql @q if @type = '1' begin update dmphi set ten_phi = b.ten_phi, ten_phi2 = b.ten_phi2, nh_phi1 = b.nh_phi1, nh_phi2 = b.nh_phi2, nh_phi3 = b.nh_phi3, datetime2 = getdate(), user_id2 = @@userID from dmphi a, #k b where a.ma_phi = b.ma_phi end
